rows.label: qev096102_MSG0001
rows.name:
Commander Vandham told me you'd be stopping
by to take the Doll license exam.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0002
rows.name:
Do you have your certifications
from the eight proficiency exams?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Yep, looks like a
full set. Nice work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0004
rows.name: We're ready for the final exam.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0005
rows.name:
No need to stress, though.
It's a simple verbal quiz.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0006
rows.name:
We had you run missions for
each of the eight Unions, and
there's a reason for that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0007
rows.name: Care to guess what it might be?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_JNK0010
rows.name: Deduce

rows.label: qev096102_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that it was to better understand the
role each Union plays within BLADE.

rows.label: qev096102_JNK0020
rows.name: Joke

rows.label: qev096102_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that it was Vandham's
way of hazing you.

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0008
rows.name:
Exactly! Now you've got a feel for
each one's particular flavor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hopefully that's given you a few ideas
of how you can put a Doll to use.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0010
rows.name:
Heh. Believe me, he's put me
through plenty— but it wasn't just
spite that motivated this call.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0011
rows.name:
I expect those missions have
given you a feel for each
Union's particular flavor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hopefully that's given you a few ideas
of how you can put a Doll to use.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0013
rows.name:
Anyway, that's one reason.
But there's another.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0014
rows.name:
There aren't exactly enough Dolls
to go around all of the Unions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0015
rows.name:
Sometimes situations arise where
people have to cross Union lines
and cooperate to get things done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0016
rows.name:
For efficiency's sake, it's
important that everyone knows
how the other Unions work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0017
rows.name: Make sense?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev096102_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod in understanding.

rows.label: qev096102_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev096102_SEL0041
rows.name: Shake your head in confusion.

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0018
rows.name: Hmm. Guess I wasn't very clear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'll try again. We can keep
going over it till it clicks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0020
rows.name:
Better that than letting a BLADE
run wild in a Doll without
understanding what it means.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0021
rows.name:
Each of the eight Unions has
its own characteristic traits.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0022
rows.name:
You should have gotten a feel for that over the
course of those tests—the types of work they do
and the role they serve in NLA are all different.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0023
rows.name: And each uses Dolls differently as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0024
rows.name:
Keep that in mind when deciding how
to put yours to productive use.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0025
rows.name: Oh, and one more thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0026
rows.name:
There's a limit to the
number of Dolls we've got.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0027
rows.name:
Sometimes we need to pool those resources
and work together to get things done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0028
rows.name:
Knowing everyone's role is crucial to
making such joint operations run smoothly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0029
rows.name: Clearer now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_JNK0050
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev096102_SEL0051
rows.name: Nod in understanding.

rows.label: qev096102_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev096102_SEL0061
rows.name: Say you're still confused.

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0030
rows.name:
Good. Then you are now cleared
to own and operate a Doll![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0031
rows.name: I'll authorize your license now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0032
rows.name:
I also get to share some good
news—looks like you're being given
a free Doll, compliments of Vandham.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0033
rows.name:
It's parked in the hangar in
the back. Go introduce yourself
and give it a test ride.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_JNK0070
rows.name: Thank

rows.label: qev096102_SEL0071
rows.name:
Tell Walter how much you
appreciate his help.

rows.label: qev096102_JNK0080
rows.name: Provoke

rows.label: qev096102_SEL0081
rows.name:
Demand that everyone on your
team receive a free Doll.

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0034
rows.name:
Just doing my own job. Really, Vandham
is the one you should be thanking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0035
rows.name:
He must expect big things from
you—it's a rare day a rookie pilot
gets issued a Doll free of charge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0036
rows.name:
I look forward to seeing
what you do with it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0037
rows.name:
...Wow. You've got brass,
I'll give you that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0038
rows.name:
Commander Vandham paid for that
Doll out of his own private funds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0039
rows.name:
And you're going to go and
ask for... Just...wow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0040
rows.name:
Yeah, I don't think I'm comfortable
issuing a license to someone who can't
appreciate the kindness of others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0041
rows.name: Retest![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0042
rows.name:
You'll start the whole process
over from the beginning.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0043
rows.name:
Er, no. That's too easy. I'm adding
a hundred hours of mandatory
classroom training on top of it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0044
rows.name: ...Is what I SHOULD say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0045
rows.name:
Seriously, though, if the commander heard you
he'd be crying right now. And is that what you
want? Big salty Vandham tears all over the place?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0046
rows.name:
All right. If you've learned your lesson, go
take your Doll for a ride. Commander Vandham
and I both are expecting great things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0047
rows.name:
Go become an ace pilot and make
yourself useful to BLADE, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev096102_MSG0048
rows.name:
Head on back in the hangar. I'm sure your
Doll is dying to meet its new owner.[ST:wait ]
